name: @slothfulchat/calls
description: Native 1:1 WebRTC calls, our own peer wire-compatible with deltachat/calls-webapp. engine/ (pure TS, zero React/DOM imports) + ui/ (React) + bridge/ (runtime glue). See docs/calls.md.

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit -p engine/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p ui/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p bridge/tsconfig.json
